pages.title: Desert Faction
pages.text: Sun-gold and legion. Forty-seven ultra-hard recipes — the hardest in the pack. Claim with $(l:factions/overview)/cabafaction claim desert$(/l).

pages.title: Nomad armor sets
pages.text: $(bold)Pharaoh$(/), $(bold)Anubis$(/), $(bold)Exalted Aurum$(/), $(bold)Quetzalcoatl$(/).$(br2)Plus $(bold)Centurion$(/) sub-style.$(br2)Fantasy sets: $(bold)Golden Horns$(/), $(bold)Golden Execution$(/), $(bold)Eclipse Soldier$(/).

pages.title: Signature weapons
pages.text: $(bold)Desert Wind, Golden Halberd, Marika Hammer, Kingslayer.$(/)$(br2)$(bold)Golden Horns Battleaxe, Golden Execution Battleaxe, Eclipse Soldier Spear.$(/)$(br2)$(bold)Weathered blades.$(/) Old Blade, Old Broadsword, Old Dagger, Sharp Sword, Savage Sword, Sharp Spear, Savage Spear, Savage Hammer, Hefty Club.
